mapper.sql: id, property_code, property_name, property_type, city, status
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM property WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( LOWER(property_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(property_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(city) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') )
SELECT FROM property WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM property WHERE property_code = #{propertyCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property (tenant_id, property_code, property_name, property_type, city, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyCode}, #{propertyName}, #{propertyType}, #{city}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE property SET property_code = #{request.propertyCode}, property_name = #{request.propertyName}, property_type = #{request.propertyType}, city = #{request.city}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE property SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
